mapper.select:
WITH OPNN ( RN, DSCS_CMNT_ID, DSCS_ATCL_ID, UP_CMNT_ID, CMNT_CTS, CMNT_CTS_LEN, EMT_TYCD, RGTR_ID, REG_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM, DELYN, RSPNS_REQYN, USER_ID, CHILD_YN, LVL, PATH ) AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC, A.DSCS_CMNT_ID) AS RN , A.DSCS_CMNT_ID , A.DSCS_ATCL_ID , A.UP_CMNT_ID , A.CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMT_TYCD , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN , A.USER_ID , CASE WHEN C.UP_CMNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHILD_YN , 1 AS LVL , LPAD(A.DSCS_CMNT_ID, 20, '0') AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT UP_CMNT_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DELYN = 'N' ) C ON C.UP_CMNT_ID = A.DSCS_CMNT_ID WHERE A.UP_CMNT_ID IS NULL AND A.DSCS_ATCL_ID = #{dscsAtclId}
UNION ALL
SELECT B.RN , A.DSCS_CMNT_ID , A.DSCS_ATCL_ID , A.UP_CMNT_ID , A.CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMT_TYCD , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN , A.USER_ID , CASE WHEN C.UP_CMNT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHILD_YN , B.LVL + 1 AS LVL , B.PATH || '-' || LPAD(A.DSCS_CMNT_ID, 20, '0') AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT A JOIN OPNN B ON A.UP_CMNT_ID = B.DSCS_CMNT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT UP_CMNT_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DELYN = 'N' ) C ON C.UP_CMNT_ID = A.DSCS_CMNT_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ATCL_ID = #{dscsAtclId} ) SELECT A.DSCS_CMNT_ID , A.DSCS_ATCL_ID , A.UP_CMNT_ID , PU.USERNM AS upUsernm , TO_CHAR(A.CMNT_CTS) AS CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMT_TYCD , U.USERNM , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN , A.USER_ID AS STD_ID , A.LVL - 1 AS lvl , A.PATH , '' AS phtFileByte FROM OPNN A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT PC ON PC.DSCS_CMNT_ID = A.UP_CMNT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER PU ON PU.USER_ID = PC.USER_ID
(A.DELYN IN ('N', 'H') OR A.CHILD_YN = 'Y')
ORDER BY A.RN, A.PATH
SELECT DSCS_CMNT_ID , DSCS_ATCL_ID , UP_CMNT_ID , CMNT_CTS , EMT_TYCD , DELYN , RSPNS_REQYN , CMNT_CTS_LEN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_CMNT_ID = #{dscsCmntId}
